c.d: The total number of times the app has been downloaded across all platforms. A higher number indicates greater popularity and reach.
Average rating given by users, reflecting satisfaction and perceived quality of the app. Higher rating suggests a better user experience.
The number of users actively playing the game on a daily or monthly basis. A larger active user base indicates higher engagement and community.
The variety of gameplay experiences offered, including action, puzzle, strategy, and simulation. A diverse genre selection appeals to a broader audience.
How often the app receives updates, including new content, bug fixes, and performance improvements. Regular updates indicate ongoing support and development.
